title: melilotoides squarrosa
intro: Melilotoides squarrosa, also known as the Melilotus squarrosus, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, characterized by its small, yellowish flowers and hairy stems. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Melilotoides squarrosa include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make teas and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
